# CHAPTER 5

# REVIEW QUESTIONS

Matching. Match the choices from column B with the appropriate statements in column A.

## Column A

1. Found at the ocean bottom
2. Prefer high temperature
3. Grow in sour cream
4. Survive pasteurization
5. Live in high-salt environments
6. Thrive in high-pressure environments
7. Live at pH 7.0
8. Prefer acidic environments
9. Use carbon dioxide
10. Live in slight oxygen environments

## Column B

(a) Barophile
(b) Neutrophile
(c) Halophile
(d) Thermophile
(e) Acidophile
(f) Microaerophile
(g) Autotroph

Matching. Match the same column B choices to a second set of statements in column A.

## Column A

1. Grow best where pH is neutral
2. Can be microaerophilic
3. Multiply by binary fission
4. Do not form any resistant structures
5. Certain species grow on mannitol salt agar
6. Cell division occurs at the tips of hyphae
7. Grow primarily in liquid environments in the laboratory
8. Some important species grow anaerobically
9. Do not undergo any sort of cell division
10. Multiply only in living tissues
